title: md2pdf-ai
desc: A modern Markdown to PDF converter that offers live preview & syntax highlighting & PDF export & local storage for file persistence & and an AI assistant to help edit content.

title: llmfordata-flow
desc: Lightweight end-to-end workflow that scrapes multiple data sources (arXiv, Hugging Face, PapersWithCode, Databricks, Snowflake, NVIDIA, SemanticScholar), analyzes items with an LLM (via OpenRouter) to extract topics, keywords, summaries and emerging algorithms, generates markdown reports and charts, stores artifacts in a database, and sends browser push notifications to subscribed users.

title: Roach Cluster AI Monitoring
desc: Monitoring and simulation platform for a CockroachDB cluster with integrated AI intrusion-detection. Provides a realtime cluster topology dashboard and AI module status, AI modules for threat detection, and client simulators for load and attack testing.

title: NeuroCareAI
desc: Research work: Fast, optimized AI model with a custom architecture for 3D brain‑tumor segmentation from low-quality 2D MRI scans (robust to missing sequences). Achieved 93% precision on real patient data with expert validation; includes an API, WebGL 3D visualization web app, and a desktop app. Preparing to outsource the codebase and documentation for broader clinical integration.

title: DL/ML Library
desc: A machine learning library built from scratch using Numpy. It provides an environment for developing custom layers and activation methods, supporting classical NNs and CNNs while expanding for additional tools.

title: MAJESTY
desc: An e-commerce API featuring 3D product previews generated from multi-angle images processed with photogrammetry algorithms. Includes shop and order management systems with statistics.
